# MergeablePartsContainer.PartID

**Type Alias**

The type for document layer IDs.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias PartID = MergeablePartsContainerPartID
```

## Getting the part identifiers

- **partIDs**: Returns a collection of part IDs reflecting the manifest of parts available in the document.
